title: Manufacturing Engineer - Jindal Steel & Power - Freshers Welcome

jsonLd.title: Manufacturing Engineer - Jindal Steel & Power - Freshers Welcome
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Manufacturing Engineer with drive and ambition, Jindal Steel & Power in Bengaluru is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Jindal Steel & Power:
Jindal Steel & Power is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods
• Maintain accurate production records and prepare daily reports
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Quality Control
• Proficiency in 5S
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in FMEA
• Proficiency in Root Cause Analysis
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in APQP
• Proficiency in Kaizen

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Annual performance appraisal
• Referral bonus program
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Bengaluru, Karnataka, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Jindal Steel & Power!
